title: Maintenance plan, update cadence + outcome-tracking ledger
context: Long-term value requires a documented update cadence, a named maintainer, and a ledger tracking real-world outcomes delivered. This task writes the maintenance plan and stands up the outcome-tracking ledger. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Document the maintenance plan, update cadence, and named maintainer, and stand up an outcome-tracking ledger recording beneficiary outcomes.
acceptanceCriteria: Maintenance plan documents update cadence and a named maintainer.
Outcome-tracking ledger is live and records delivered outcomes.
output: /output/ops/maintenance-plan.md plus an outcome-tracking ledger, committed to the repo.
